name: Alumni Services
description: Assists the Brooklyn Tech Alumni Foundation in planning and running events such as Career Day, Recent Alumni Day, Internship Forum, and Homecoming. Members help execute events, interact with alumni, and gain insight into life after high school.

name: Club Team Council
description: Bridges the gap between the Student Government Organization and NHS by supporting club-related initiatives. Members provide logistical support for events like the Club Fair and track club meetings throughout the year.

name: College Services
description: Supports College Office events such as the College Fair by assisting with setup, guiding attendees, and helping operations run smoothly. Members gain insight into the college process and help share information with the student body.

name: Community Services
description: Focuses on improving communities through volunteer work such as beautification, assisting those in need, and organizing events like walks, cultural festivals, and park cleanups. Members work with nonprofits and can receive official volunteer hours.

name: Fundraising
description: Raises funds to support NHS initiatives and events through donation drives and school events like Parent Teacher Conferences and the High School Fair. The committee ensures NHS has the financial support needed to operate and grow.

name: Induction
description: Plans and executes major NHS events including the Induction Ceremony and Installation Dinner. Members help design programs, coordinate logistics, greet guests, and develop leadership and organizational skills.

name: Mentoring
description: Supports students across all grades by mentoring freshmen and fostering a collaborative school environment. Members guide peers through high school and the college process while promoting community within the school.

name: Outreach
description: Handles communication and promotion through multimedia efforts including graphic design and journalism. Members create newsletters, write articles, design event materials, and collaborate with other organizations to promote NHS.

name: Parent Services
description: Supports events involving parents, including PA meetings and the Cultural Fair. Members collaborate with parents, students, and staff to strengthen connections within the school community.

name: School Environment Services
description: Works to maintain a clean, safe, and inclusive school environment by collaborating with students and administration. Members help improve facilities, organize activities, promote environmental awareness, and provide a platform for student concerns.
